brand.name: Elements
brand.subtitle: Handpan store
brand.vision: To create one of the world's most emotionally resonant, spiritually grounded, and visually refined handpan brands, merging craftsmanship, sound healing, and elemental symbolism.
brand.mission1: Offer high-quality handpans accessible to a global audience
brand.mission2: Create meaning through elements, sound, and story
brand.mission3: Build long-term trust through education, transparency, and artistry

hero.sub: Discover handpans and sound healing instruments crafted to bring calm, clarity, and balance—gently guiding you into a deeper state of presence.
hero.hintSound: Tap to hear a single tone (muted until you unmute)

mag.stripLabel: Builds ready to ship this month
mag.categoriesTitle: Which path fits how you play?
mag.warrantyBody: We document how each build leaves the bench and how it should settle in your space. If travel or humidity shifts the profile, you get clear guidance and a path to correction—not radio silence.
mag.collectionBlurb: Our handpan collection features instruments with rich, resonant tones and balanced playability. Each piece is crafted for intuitive expression, supporting both meditative flow and musical depth.
mag.whyChoose3: Guidance for every level of practice
mag.whyChoose4: A growing community of sound practitioners
mag.newsletterBodyAlt: Scale guides, recording notes, and builder interviews — inline signup only, no modal, no chase.
mag.buyingGuideEssence: Long-form essays live in the Journal. The essence: pick a scale that matches the rooms you actually play in, the music you actually listen to, and the volume your life accommodates. Logistics are insured end-to-end. Build slots open monthly and we'll never email you to "move fast."
mag.showroomsHomeBody: Bali, Indonesia — request an audition slot via contact once the calendar opens. Quiet rooms, soft floors, no pressure.

journal.title: Journal
journal.p1: Dispatch notes on scales, room acoustics, and how builds settle after travel. No growth hacks: only what helps you choose and care for an instrument.
journal.p2: Field recordings and builder conversations land here first. Subscribe from the home page when you want the thread in your inbox.
journal.p3: Editorial calendar is intentionally light so each piece earns its place.

showrooms.title: Showrooms
showrooms.p1: Bali hosts audition slots by appointment. Calendars open in phases so each visit gets tuned time and a quiet room.
showrooms.p2: Use the contact page to request a preferred window. You will receive logistics for humidity-controlled storage and bench-ready instruments.
showrooms.p3: Remote voicing checks remain available if travel is not practical.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.p1: Insured carriers handle handpans as fragile freight with signature release where regulations allow. Tracking syncs to the same thread as your order confirmation.
shipping.p2: Lead times on product pages reflect bench and curing windows, not marketing buffers. If customs holds a shipment, support receives the carrier feed and responds with next steps.
shipping.p3: Consolidated invoices list declared value for insurance alignment.

returns.title: Returns
returns.p1: A 30-day return window applies to eligible instruments listed as in stock, provided the handpan returns in the same condition with supplied accessories and packaging.
returns.p2: Custom or preordered builds may carry different terms noted at checkout. Initiate a return from your order receipt or the track order flow so the bench can expect the package.
returns.p3: Refund timing follows your payment method once inspection confirms condition.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.p1: Elements processes checkout data to fulfill orders and send transactional updates. Payment card details stay with the processor; Elements stores what is required for taxes and support.
privacy.p2: Analytics runs on aggregated traffic without selling personal data. Newsletter signup on the home page is opt-in and separate from checkout email.
privacy.p3: You may request deletion of non-financial records where law permits retention exceptions for accounting.

contact.title: Contact
contact.p1: Order updates, tuning questions, and showroom requests share one queue. Reference your order number when writing to info@elements.com.
contact.p2: Dany Rud · Owner · Elements — Handpan & Sound Healing · Ubud, Gianyar · Bali, Indonesia.
contact.p3: Press and partnership inquiries: include distribution region and timeline so routing stays accurate.

cart.title: Cart
cart.checkoutError: Checkout could not start. Try again.

product.checkoutError: Checkout could not start. Try again.
product.preorderNote: Pre-order: lead time applies before shipment.

success.title: Thank you for choosing Elements
success.line1: Each tone carries a quiet intention—to soften, to ground, and to restore.
success.line2: May it resonate with you, in moments both heard and felt.
success.receipt: Payment confirmed. A receipt is on the way to your inbox.
success.fulfillment: We will email if we need scale confirmation or a revised build window.

designSystem.title: Design system
designSystem.intro: Elements Handpan Store brand kit — tokens and copy from the PDF guide.
